name: Ascot Resources Ltd.
description: Ascot Resources Ltd. is a Canadian mineral development company focused on re-starting the past-producing Premier gold-silver mine, located in British Columbia's Golden Triangle. The company is actively advancing the Premier Gold Project, which benefits from existing infrastructure including a mill, tailings storage facility, and easy road access. Ascot is committed to safe, responsible, and sustainable resource development while creating long-term value for its shareholders and local communities.
